heading: Establishment of Fisheries Promotional Fund
label: 4008 Establishment of Fisheries Promotional Fund
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (e) of amended , Commerce and Trade.section 209 of Pub. L. 99–659section 209 of Pub. L. 99–659section 713c–3 of Title 15
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (e) of amended , Commerce and Trade.section 209 of Pub. L. 99–659section 209 of Pub. L. 99–659section 713c–3 of Title 15

children.heading: Establishment of Fund
children.label: a Establishment of Fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a Fisheries Promotional Fund. The Fund shall be available, to the extent provided for in appropriation Acts, for the purpose of making payments to carry out the annual marketing and promotion plan and annual budget of the National Council under this chapter.
the moneys transferred to the Fund under ;section 713c–3(b)(2) of title 15
payments made voluntarily pursuant to ; andsection 4007 of this title
receipts from investments made under subsection (c) of this section.

children.heading: Deposits and investments
children.label: c Deposits and investments
children.text: Sums in the Fund that are not currently needed for the purposes of the Fund shall be kept on deposit in appropriate interest-bearing accounts that shall be established by the Secretary of the Treasury, or invested in obligations of, or guaranteed by, the United States. Any revenue accruing from such deposits and investments shall be deposited in the Fund.

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: d Authorization
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated from the Fund, for the purposes of carrying out the annual marketing and promotion plan and annual budget of the National Council under this chapter, such sums as are deposited in the Fund under subsection (b) of this section in each fiscal year beginning in fiscal year 1987 through fiscal year 1991.
